source: 15-minute pull history only plus current moneyline/run-line book data

coverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.
